prompt: hey can you document that pricing 404 bug? the one where GET /pricing returned 404 for listed SKUs because PricingEngine.setInitialPrice was never called

assertions.name: has_all_sections
assertions.description: Contains sections: Summary, Timeline, Symptom, Root Cause, Fix Applied, Impact, Lessons Learned, Prevention

assertions.name: has_severity
assertions.description: Includes a severity rating (Critical, High, Medium, or Low)

assertions.name: has_prevention_checkboxes
assertions.description: Prevention section has at least one '- [ ]' action item

assertions.name: names_setInitialPrice
assertions.description: Root cause mentions PricingEngine.setInitialPrice was never called

assertions.name: explains_missing_listener
assertions.description: Explains that no event listener bridged SkuStateChanged to the pricing module
